productDisplayName: ADIDAS Pune Warriors Unisex Teal Match Cap
description: IPL caps are up for grabs and you can help your team strike fear into the heart of the opposition! Wear this Pune Warriors match cap from adidas when you're cheering at the sideline - get the uniform here and join the Warriors' Army. Beat the heat in this cap as the cotton fabric and eyelets keep your head cool and dry all day. Team it with an adidas PW jersey to complete your sporty fashion statement during the IPL season. Made of 100% cotton Embroidered eyelets on the crown Embroidered brand name on the back, above the strap Pune Warriors branding on the crown Adidas patented 3-Stripes in white on the visor Adjustable back strap Cap care Machine wash in cold water or hand wash separately Do not tumble dry, use softeners or bleach Line dry
